mnemonics.title: Inheritance Types
mnemonics.content: Silly Monkeys Make Hilarious Hoots - Single, Multiple, Multilevel, Hierarchical, Hybrid

mnemonics.title: Constructor Order
mnemonics.content: Base Before Derived - Constructors execute from Base to Derived classes

mnemonics.title: Destructor Order
mnemonics.content: Derived Before Base - Destructors execute in reverse order of constructors

mnemonics.title: Access Specifier Effects
mnemonics.content: Public-Public, Protected-Protected, Private-Private - Public inheritance keeps access, protected makes public→protected, private makes all private
